title: ocotea aligra
intro: Ocotea aligra, also known as Aniba rosaeodora, is a plant species native to the Amazon rainforest, belonging to the Lauraceae family. The essential oil extracted from its bark has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ocotea aligra oil include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system. Ocotea aligra oil is commonly used in herbal preparations such as aromatherapy, massage oils, and skincare products, making it a popular natural remedy for promoting overall well-being.
